title: Add Claude fallback when Grok API is unavailable

log.context: Add Claude fallback when Grok API is unavailable

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**File:** `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/serve.py` (lines 612-617)

The `grok` branch in `_handle_congress_post` now wraps `_call_grok()` in a try/except. On any exception (403, network error, etc.), it prints a warning and falls back to `_call_claude()` with the same arguments. The outer try/except still catches any failure from the Claude fallback itself.

Committed as `5629b85`, pushed to `main`, and `website.service` is confirmed active.
